public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as district fixer.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a district fixer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of district fixer in and around Aurora Heights District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Heights District workable through the obligations of district fixer while managing the immediate pressure of alliances in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must keep throughput credible under conditions that reward deferral more than repair. Around Aurora Heights District, that usually means carrying alliances, espionage, elite reputation without letting the role of district fixer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Aelric Velvetmere can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Aelric Velvetmere needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Aurora Heights District.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Aelric Velvetmere visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Aurora Heights District, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Shelk nobility, elite magistrates.

what_they_refuse: Aelric Velvetmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Aelric Velvetmere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
